summary: Completed backend testing of Postmark email integration. All 48 tests pass (12 new email tests + 36 existing). Fixed bug in task reminder endpoint where status field was incorrectly queried from database (status is calculated dynamically, not stored).
passed_tests: Email: /api/email/status returns 6 templates (welcome, task_reminder, task_overdue, minutes_created, distribution_created, distribution_approved)
Email: Minutes creation triggers notification (background task)
Email: Distribution creation triggers notification (background task)
Email: Distribution approval triggers notification (background task)
Email: Registration queues welcome email (background task)
Email: All 6 templates listed in status endpoint

bug_fixed.issue: Task reminder endpoint queried for 'status' field in database, but 'status' is calculated dynamically by get_task_status() and not stored in MongoDB
bug_fixed.fix: Changed query to filter by 'completed_at': None and calculate status dynamically using get_task_status()
bug_fixed.impact: Task reminders were never being queued because no tasks matched the query

context_for_next_testing_agent: Email integration fully tested. Postmark is in sandbox mode - emails to domains other than contact.trustoffice.app return 412 error (expected). Email service is properly configured with 6 templates. Fixed bug in send-task-reminders endpoint. Background tasks correctly queue emails on: registration (welcome), minutes creation, distribution creation, distribution approval.

endpoints./api/email/test: WORKING - sends test email (sandbox restriction applies)
endpoints./api/email/send-task-reminders: WORKING - queues reminder emails for incomplete tasks

email_integration_verified.postmark_sandbox_note: Emails to external domains (e.g., trustoffice.com) fail with 412 error until Postmark account is approved. This is expected behavior.
